title: Get signing and provisioning right
description: Match bundle id, capabilities, certificate, and provisioning profile so the app installs on devices and ships to the Store.
body: Use when an app fails to install on device or archive for distribution. Do not mismatch the bundle id, entitlements, and provisioning profile, and do not ship with a development profile. Actions: align the bundle id across target and profile, ensure entitlements match the profile's capabilities, use a distribution certificate and profile for release archives, and prefer managed (automatic) signing unless a specific need requires manual. Validation signals include a clean archive that validates for the Store and installs on a registered device. Risk boundary: an expired certificate or wrong profile blocks all installs/releases and can interrupt shipping; treat signing config as release-critical and verify before a submission deadline.
